title: Architectoribus Datum
description: Architectoribus Datum is a modpack designed to enhance the player's creative building experience in Minecraft.
body:

# Introduction
## Content Overview
Architectoribus Datum is a modpack designed to enhance the player's creative building experience in Minecraft. Rather than focusing on a specific type of construction—such as cities or rail transit—it introduces a variety of new features and improvements on top of the vanilla game, serving as a flexible foundation that players can freely expand upon to meet their individual architectural needs.

Through the addition of building-assist mods, Architectoribus Datum enriches and extends the limited building tools available in the base game. Information display mods, along with a selection of simple yet effective utility mods, further elevate the overall experience. Moreover, sufficient optimization ensures smooth and comfortable gameplay during construction.

## Feature Summary
1. **High Extensibility:** This modpack serves as a flexible foundation that can be freely customized based on individual architectural needs. Within reasonable scope, the author will provide compatibility support for modifications.

2. **Effective Performance Optimization:** Utilizes various optimization mods to enhance performance in areas such as graphics rendering, memory usage, chunk loading, multiplayer networking, logic processing, and game loading.

3. **Enhanced Multiplayer Experience:** Incorporates mods specifically optimized for multiplayer settings and network connectivity.

4. **Carefully Selected Mods:** Each mod is intentionally chosen to align with the pack’s theme, ensuring that every addition is both useful and beneficial to players. Mods such as JEI or Farmer's Delight—which offer little relevance to railway transit or city construction—are deliberately excluded. This approach distinguishes the pack from conventional adventure or building/tech modpacks, while thoughtful configuration ensures seamless integration of included mods.

5. **Tailored for Creative Builders:** To enhance the building experience, all particle effects and certain screen effects are disabled by default, and most mob spawning (including all overworld mobs and all hostile entities) is removed. These adjustments can be toggled on or off as desired.
